On 7/23/11 7:54 AM, Michiel Overtoom wrote:
> > 
> --- /usr/src/share/man/man4/wi.4.orig   2011-07-23 15:47:40.000000000
> +0200 +++ /usr/src/share/man/man4/wi.4        2011-07-23
> 15:49:10.000000000 +0200 @@ -319,7 +319,7 @@ .Xr wpa_supplicant 8 . 
> .Rs .%T HCF Light programming specification -.%U
> http://www.wavelan.com +.%U
> http://bwrc.eecs.berkeley.edu/People/Grad_Students/jbeutel/wavelan_s0005-11-light.htm
>
> 
.Re
> .Sh HISTORY The

Hi,

The URL is too long, and it fails mdoc(7) tests with formatting the
manual.  Looking at DragonFlyBSD's wi(4) manual, they reference the
original page through webarchive.org, which I think is a more ideal
solution here.

http://leaf.dragonflybsd.org/cgi/web-man?command=wi&section=4

What do you think?

Regards,

Glen

- -- 
Glen Barber | gjb@FreeBSD.org
FreeBSD Documentation Project
